description: DB-backed integration: a recurring contract-hourly window with at least one matching uninvoiced time entry whose approval status is not APPROVED is classified as approval-blocked and excluded from Ready to Invoice.
DB-backed integration: a recurring window is not blocked by unrelated unapproved client time that falls outside the effective billable selection semantics for that window.
DB-backed integration: a mixed-charge recurring window containing fixed charges plus matching unapproved hourly time is blocked in full rather than partially invoiceable.

Unit/integration: any non-approved status used by time approval workflows (for example DRAFT, SUBMITTED, or CHANGES_REQUESTED) contributes to the approval-blocker count, while already invoiced entries do not.
Automatic Invoices renders a dedicated Needs Approval section above Ready to Invoice and moves approval-blocked grouped windows out of the ready list.
Needs Approval grouped rows show client, service period, invoice window, `X unapproved entries`, and a Review Approvals action, while remaining non-selectable and non-generatable.
Automatic Invoices preserves existing Ready to Invoice grouped selection behavior for windows that have no approval blockers.
Server generation guard: recurring invoice generation rejects a blocked window immediately before invoice creation and returns a descriptive error including the blocked entry count.
Server generation guard: a stale UI case where a window looked ready earlier but matching time becomes non-approved before generation is rejected by the server-side re-check.

Recurring billing run behavior: when one selected target is approval-blocked and another is eligible, the run records a blocker failure for the blocked target while continuing to process the unrelated eligible target.
Approval resolution flow: once the blocking entries are approved, the same recurring window leaves Needs Approval and appears in Ready to Invoice on refresh.
Docs/copy coverage: in-product helper text and plan/runbook text state that the entire invoice window is blocked until the billable time is approved.
